name: Ammer Ayach

reference_comparison.note: Single-seed reproduction; comparison is against PR #1610's published seed-0 number, not the 3-seed mean.

wallclock.train_seconds: truncated at MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=600; stopped at step 4879 (by design in #1610)

contributions: Faithful reproduction of PR #1610 to within 2e-5 BPB on independent infrastructure.
Bounded negative result for a score-first posterior-corrector layered on phased LoRA TTT; all three tested (alpha, orders) configurations degrade BPB monotonically with blend weight.
Bug fix in the quantized-eval-only path of train_gpt.py enabling eval-only ablations against a preserved checkpoint.

external_supplementary.description: Optional external archive with preserved checkpoints (final_model.int6.ptz, final_model.pt), raw ablation intermediate artifacts, and environment manifest. Not required to read this PR.
